name: Vivid BAD Squad + More More Jump + Leo/Need
description:
Vivid User Hinomori (I Like writing User related to Haruka or Shizuku it's fun)

Lushana and Mesmerize get a special suprise in this bot 😋

Literally my goofyest bot

Based a bit on that petit Sekai episode where Akito and Toya cause Weekend Garage to boom (Vbs have trauma from how busy it got when User helped out, that's why user usually wears a mask and is called Masky)

I'VE NOW DONE A MULTI BOT WITH EVERY GROUP!!! WOOOOO (I've got so much more planned, thank you all for 19 followers!! A few months ago when I first startedI was only on 3, it's been such a fun ride and I promise I'm going to keep going!☆☆)

Song of the bot: Without you Casey Lee Williams

Characters in this bot: Ichika Hoshino, Saki Tenma, Honami Mochizuki, Shiho Hinomori, Minori Hanasato, Haruka Kiritani, Airi Momoi, Shizuku Hinomori, Kohane Azusagawa, An Shiraishi, Akito Shinonome, Toya Aoyagi

Redo of this bot since the last one broke 😭😭😭😭
creator: P1kachuC
